reviews.review_description:
I’m an experienced real‑life golfer (12 handicap) and a Golf+ player practically since the day it launched. I admit that Golf+ is a fun game, but I eventually grew tired of the inconsistencies in its physics. I learned how to hit better or worse shots, not by applying my real golf technique, but by using a technique specific to the game. I even managed to finish under par several 18‑hole round while sitting in a chair with with an injuryon my ankle .

I only recently discovered Golf 5, and it’s a completely different world. Here I’m actually playing golf, making a real swing just like on the course. I instinctively know, just as I do in real golf, when I’ve hit a good shot, or when and why I’ve missed. I currently have a 13 handicap in the game and, just like in real life, and I can’t seem to improve it anymore, proof of how incredibly accurate the simulation is. Golf+ still has the advantage of offering more courses, but Golf 5 more than makes up for it with far superior realism, graphics, and immersion.

If you’re a golfer, I strongly recommend giving Golf 5 a try. If you just want to have some fun and don’t mind ruining your real‑life swing, then stick with Golf+.

Gianni

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thank you so much, Gianni. We’re truly delighted to hear how much you’re enjoying Golf 5.

We genuinely believe there’s room in the market for both experiences: one that’s more arcadish and casual style , and another, like Golf 5, designed as a true simulator for golfers who want realism, top graphics and authenticity.

We’re really grateful that you chose ours. Enjoy your rounds out there!

Best regards,
Thje Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: I love this game but I’m struggling with playing with specific friends. I don’t know if it’s a glitch or the game but I’m finding linking with specific friends to be very frustrating.

developer_response.body:
Hi stefenfx,

Thank you for reaching out!

To create an online match, please go to PLAY ONLINE. After selecting your favorite clubhouse, you can either create a match and wait for other players to join, or join an existing match already created by someone else.

If you’re experiencing any specific difficulty, feel free to share the details with us at users@aaagamestudios.com. 99% of issues are solved quickly with a simple email, and we’ll be happy to help.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: This is a great golf game the only problem is hitting out of the Bunker is almost impossible at times I swing and the ball might roll a couple of feet I don't know what is going on I would give it 5 stars but the Bunker shots hold it back it could be me but when I play golf plus I don't have that issue any suggestions to fix the issue How come the Safari golf course says membership and green fees I can't access the game I thought it came free with the other 3 courses,or maybe I'm doing something wrong

developer_response.body:
Hi oxtail2.2024,

Thanks for your comment.

For a successful bunker shot, the method in Golf 5 is exactly the same as in real golf:

- Open the clubface before setting up
Do it before gripping the club, not after. This helps the club “slide” under the ball and throw sand, not hit the ball clean.
- Play the ball forward in your stance. Place it in line with your left heel (if you’re right‑handed). This way you hit the sand before the ball, which is what you want in soft bunker sand.
- Aim at a point about 1 inch behind the ball.
In a standard bunker shot, you don’t hit the ball—you hit the sand.

We hope this helps.

Best regards
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: I own this and golf plus while. I do like the graphics more in this. The quality of the game all around is pretty good. club head size looked a little big/off to me. With that said I usually play golf plus over this game. Mainly because of user interface on golf plus on course is Just so much better.

developer_response.body:
Hi klindow1,

Thanks for the feedback! The issue with the club head size can usually be fixed with a clean reinstall of the game. Here’s how to do it:

1. Clear the game data: In the Meta operating system, open Quick Settings, then tap Settings in the top‑right corner. Go to Storage, find Golf 5 in the Manage Storage list, and tap Clear App Data next to the game to delete its data.
2. Uninstall and reinstall the game: Don’t worry — your handicap, achievements, and records will remain intact.

Please let us know if this solves the problem. You can reach us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Thanks for playing!

Best regards,
The Golf 5 team

reviews.review_title: Decent Golf Sim Held Back by Quirks!
reviews.review_description:
Golf 5 eClub delivers a full 18-hole course with surprisingly good graphics for native Quest, but the experience stumbles where it matters most: feel. The biggest issue is judging shot strength. It seems tied more to swing angle than actual speed or power, which throws off your instincts constantly. 

I found myself consistently misjudging distances compared to how these shots would work in real golf or even other VR golf games. The putting physics are genuinely odd. Balls don't slow down naturally, they just suddenly stop, like someone forgot to ease out an animation curve. It breaks immersion immediately. 

There's also zero haptic feedback, which is baffling for a sport that's all about club-to-ball contact. The mini golf mode is bare-bones, more like backyard practice obstacles than anything themed or fun. On the plus side, there are plenty of options, multiple game modes, and the presentation is solid. 

If you're desperate for full golf on Quest and can overlook wonky physics, it might work. For the full impressions, search YouTube for 6DOF Reviews Golf 5 eClub.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your thoughts, KarmaMole!

Regarding the swing‑angle issue, it’s actually very possible that what you’re seeing isn’t a bug but part of the intended simulation. In real golf, hitting the ball with an ascending angle (the club moving upward at impact) often means the club has brushed the ground first. That slows the club down, reduces the efficiency of the strike, and also decreases backspin, which makes the ball stay in the air for less time and roll more once it lands.

On the other hand, a descending strike produces more backspin. If it’s too much, the ball can launch too high and also lose total distance. These effects are real and experienced golfers use them intentionally depending on the situation. The game is designed to simulate these variations.

To get started, we recommend practicing different types of swings while checking the XTi  swing parameters. It provides very valuable information about each of the 15 metrics of the shot and helps a lot when adjusting your technique in the simulator.

Keep in mind that the game simulates all of these factors and many more. If you’re a real‑world golfer, it’s normal for some sensations to feel different. The main reason is the lack of the actual weight of a real club in your hands. That’s why we recommend using a golf attachment for the controller with moveable counterweights. It gives a much more realistic feel and lets you take advantage of your real‑golf muscle memory.

As for the haptic feedback, make sure the controller vibration is enabled. You can do this in Settings by turning on “Controller vibration” under CONTROLLER / PHYSICS, in the CONTROLLERS / ATTACHMENT CONFIGURATION section. With this setting enabled, you should feel vibration in the controller both when striking the ball and when brushing the ground.

Of course, if you’re already using a golf‑club attachment, it’s very likely that you won’t feel the vibration. This isn’t a limitation of the game; most third‑party attachments simply don’t support the vibration feature.

Thanks again for the detailed review; feedback like this helps us keep improving the experience.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Like golf5 100% better than golf+. Only problem for me is I don't understand the score card.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review, dennis.hall.wdsk! 

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoy Golf5 and that it feels like a big improvement over Golf+. We’d love to help you get the most out of the game, so here’s a quick explanation of the scorecard:

✓ Hole: Hole number
✓ Par: Expected number of strokes for that hole
✓ Stroke Index (SI): Difficulty of the hole (1 = hardest, 18 = easiest)
✓ Asterisks: Show how many handicap strokes (bonus strokes) you receive on that hole
✓ Gross Score: The number of strokes you actually took
✓ Medal Score: Your gross score minus the handicap strokes. You’ll also see:
- 2 circles for an Eagle (–2)
- 1 circle for a Birdie (–1)
- 1 square for a Bogey (+1)
- 2 squares for a Double Bogey (+2)
✓ Stableford Score: Points per hole:
- +2 or worse: 0 pts
- Bogey: 1 pt
- Par: 2 pts
- Birdie: 3 pts
- Eagle: 4 pts
- Albatross: 5 pts

If you ever have any questions, feel free to write to us at users@aaagamestudios.com. We’d love to earn your fifth star!

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: It’s a good golfing game it would be better if it told me what clubs to use

developer_response.body:
Hi Kraus42, thanks for your feedback!

Choosing the right club really depends on the situation you’re in. The game only auto‑selects the putter when you’re on the green, everything else needs to be chosen by the player.

There are a few general guidelines that can help:
- On the green, you must use the putter (automatically selected by the game).
- In bunkers, the best choice is usually a wedge, especially the sand wedge (SW on the third column of the clubs menu).
- In all other situations, the key is to check the distance each club can reach. When you’re on the course, on the club menu expand any club type; on the right side you’ll see its distance.

If you’re hitting from tougher surfaces like the rough, or if you’re still getting used to the game, it’s a good idea to pick a club that hits a bit farther than you actually need.

Hope this helps you choose the right club more easily and enjoy the game!

If you need more help, feel free to contact us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

developer_response.body:
Hi RiosChiang,

Thank you for your comment. 

To re‑center the game view, press and hold the Oculus button on the right controller (the one marked with a large “O”) for a couple of seconds. While you hold the button, an “O” will appear on the screen. Once the “O” is completed, the view will be centered again — for example, the leaderboard will appear directly in front of you, and the ball will be placed inside the guardian so you can safely perform your swing.

If you ever need additional help, we have an email address where you can contact us for this or any other question: users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Someone help me

developer_response.body:
HHHTrouts,

Thanks for reaching out.

Sometimes local data can become corrupted, leading to unexpected issues. To resolve this, please follow these steps:

1.- In the Meta operating system, click on "Quick Settings" and then select "Settings" in the top right corner of the "Quick Settings" menu. Next, select "Storage" and find "Golf 5" in the "Manage Storage" list. Click "Clear App Data" next to the "Golf 5" title and delete the game data.
2.- Please uninstall and reinstall the game. Don't worry, your handicap, achievements and records will remain intact.

Please let us know if this solves the problem. You can reach us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: So I got myself an AMVRGA1 but cannot get it adjusted correctly. There is no preset for it. I just can't seem to get the adjustments that I need. Thanks for getting back to me. This has helped. Is there a way to increase the lengths of individual clubs?

developer_response.body:
Hi jamboden,

Thanks for your feedback. 

There are many different attachments on the market, and new ones appear all the time. We work to add support for them as quickly as possible.

For your AMVR GA1, you can configure it by selecting the “Generic 90º” preset.

Additionally, you may want to fine‑tune the settings to get a perfect fit. Golf 5 makes this easy using the thumb joystick on your controller. You can do this by clicking on the Position and Rotation boxes.

Position adjustments (millimetre precision):
• Left/Right: thumb joystick left/right
• Forward/Backward: thumb joystick forward/backward
• Up/Down: side trigger + thumb joystick forward/backward

Rotation adjustments:
• Pitch angle: thumb joystick left/right
• Yaw angle: thumb joystick forward/backward
• Roll angle: side trigger + thumb joystick left/right

It’s best to try each parameter to see how it affects the club — you can always press RESET to undo any changes.

The goal is to match your real‑world grip as closely as possible to the one in VR.

When you're done, press A or X on your controller to save your settings.

If you need more help, feel free to contact us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best Regards
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE.

Reinstalled 2 times same result.  Either putter is to short or all other clubs are to long.   Putter is 1/3 the length of any other club.  


So in order for your club to be the right lengths you have to adjust it every hole? I never said any clubs were the wrong length besides putter.  So if you can't adjust individually the game  is unplayable 


Really love the improvements it's very close.  Few issues I found that broke it for me though.  Putter is way to short and can't seem to find where to adjust. That leads into my second issue! Why is it so; very complicated with terms that make no sense in standard golf?  Chances? Why? Took me forever to figure out how to even just play a solo round because they prompts make no sense.  Third and game breaking.  Why does the ball fly in slow motion? Tried playing my first hole and closed the game because the sheer amount of time it tooky first drive to roll... May still be rolling. This seems to go hand in hand with the fact it seems to take zero effort to hit 300yrds. Visually the best looking golf game. Physics on the other hand is ruined with play speed.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE ***************
Hi Shayner88,

Could you please send us a screenshot of the putter as shown in the game to users@aaagamestudios.com?

Also, please let us know if you are using a golf club attachment or if you are playing with the controller only.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

UPDATE ***************
Hi Shayner88,

Thanks for your message. You don’t need to adjust the putter on every hole, just once. In addition, all clubs are designed to automatically position themselves correctly depending on which club you’re using.

If you notice that after adjusting the putter position the rest of the clubs appear misaligned, it’s possible that something in your local installation is causing the issue. A clean reinstall usually could fix this, as sometimes local data can become corrupted and lead to unexpected behavior.

To resolve it, please try the following steps:
- On the Meta operating system, open Quick Settings, then select Settings in the top‑right corner. Go to Storage, find Golf 5 in the Manage Storage list, and click Clear App Data next to the Golf 5 entry to delete the game data.
- Uninstall and reinstall the game. Don’t worry — your handicap, achievements, and records will remain intact.

Please let us know if this solves the problem. You can reach us anytime at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards
The Golf 5 Team
***************
Hi Shayner88,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback — we truly appreciate it.

Let’s go through your points one by one to help you get the best experience possible.

- Regarding the putter length, you can extend the club head forward by going into the settings menu. First enter PRACTICE mode on any course and select the putter. Then open Settings (gear icon in the top right of the screen) and go to Controllers / Attachment Configuration. After that, select Position under the Club Position & Rotation section.

To extend the club forward, push the thumb joystick forward. To save the configuration, press A (or X on the left controller). To cancel, press B (or Y on the left controller).

-  To speed up the ball flight during a round, you can press A (or X on the left controller) while the ball is in the air.

- Regarding the text you mentioned, we did a quick check for the word “chances” but couldn’t find it anywhere in the game. Could you let us know exactly where and in what situation it appeared? Please also tell us which language you are playing in.
You can contact us about this — or any other text that feels off — at users@aaagamestudios.com.

We hope we can resolve all these issues for you so you may feel comfortable updating your rating.

Best regards
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_title: “Was” a really great VR game but….

reviews.review_title: Needs some minor fixes to be 5 star
reviews.review_description:
I have had this game since 2022. Last week, I decided to invest  time and fully understand this game. After a lot of reading and research, I liked the features, i.e. egolf ranking system, tournaments, online games, driving range, etc. I decided to work on my handcap first before joining tournaments and online clubs. I practised over the weekend, and by Sunday night,  I was ready. I played 2 games that affect handcap, a 9 hole one, and an 18-hole one. Everything was super except the following issues that destroyed my vibe and the whole point of practising to improve my handcap. 

1. During the game, there were 3 times when the ball hit the green, and when I teleported to the green, my strokes were increased by 1 for no reason. I missed 2 birdies and a 1 par finish because of that. This was on 3 different holes during an 18-hole game.

2. After completing the 18-hole game, my handcap reduced to 37. When I clicked the ranking button to view the leaderboard, the game was stuck on the loading screen. I decided to restart my quest 3 and went back to the game. After restarting, everything was lost, I was back to handcap 47, and all my weekend efforts wasted. Imagine the disappointment.  My coins did not come back as well. 

Besides these 2 major issues, the graphics are good, and the swing physics is great. If the above is fixed, I will be happy to come with another review.

developer_response.body:
Hi kay3g,

Thanks a lot for sharing all these details. What you describe is definitely unusual — we haven’t had reports of those specific issues. However, sometimes local data can become corrupted, leading to unexpected behavior.

To fix this, please try the following steps:

- In the Meta operating system, open Quick Settings, then select Settings in the top‑right corner of the Quick Settings menu. Go to Storage, find Golf 5 in the Manage Storage list, and tap Clear App Data next to the Golf 5 entry to delete the game data.
- After that, please uninstall and reinstall the game. Don’t worry — your handicap, achievements, and records will remain intact.

Please let us know if this resolves the issues. You can reach us  at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards,
The Golg 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Just got the game, looks awesome by the way. But I can’t seem to get the club positioned right. Club is in the air when i try to play. Please let me know what to do. Really want to play this game. Give you 3 stars for the graphics but I haven’t gotten to play it yet.please let me know what to do. Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi Rodman2025,

Thanks for your feedback. 

To configure your attachment, go to Settings (gear icon in the upper-right corner of the screen), then select CONTROLLERS / ATTACHMENT CONFIGURATION. After that, tap CHOOSE under the ‘Golf Attachment Configuration’ section. For your AMVR, you can select the preset ‘DEADEYEVR’ or  ‘DEADEYEVR PRO’ dependng on the model of your attachment.

Additionally, you may want to fine‑tune the settings to get a perfect fit. Golf 5 makes this easy using the thumb joystick on your controller. You can do this by clicking on the Position and Rotation boxes.

Position adjustments (millimetre precision):
• Left/Right: thumb joystick left/right
• Forward/Backward: thumb joystick forward/backward
• Up/Down: side trigger + thumb joystick forward/backward

Rotation adjustments:
• Pitch angle: thumb joystick left/right
• Yaw angle: thumb joystick forward/backward
• Roll angle: side trigger + thumb joystick left/right

It’s best to try each parameter to see how it affects the club — you can always press RESET to undo any changes.

The goal is to match your real‑world grip as closely as possible to the one in VR.

When you're done, press A or X on your controller to save your settings.

If you need more help, feel free to contact us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best Regards
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_title: The Most True to Life VR Golf Experience
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing Golf 5 eClub for about 3–4 months, and it’s quickly become my favorite game on the Quest. Compared to Golf+, the physics here feel much more realistic — every slice, hook, and off-center hit shows up, and I love how unforgiving it is because it keeps me challenged and improving. I even built a DIY club attachment with a dumbbell bar taped to my controller, and that extra weight makes the swing feel way more natural.

The only weak spot is the putting. Greens roll too fast, short putts can feel off, and there’s no way to adjust speed or sensitivity. A little more tuning there would make this the complete package. 

Seeing more courses implemented into the game would be amazing like Oakmont, Pinehurst, Torrey pines, TPC sawgrass and hell, why not Augusta National. The list of courses could go on and I know it takes time, recourses, and overall skill to code and design those courses but it would be so cool to play some of the highest rated courses for a literal fraction of what it would be in real life.
⸻

Pros:
	Realistic ball flight and physics
	Challenging and less forgiving than Golf+
	Weighted attachment adds a lot to immersion
	Feels close to real golf

Cons:
	Putting feels too quick and unnatural
	No green speed/sensitivity settings
	Turf/ground contact not always accurate
	Minor calibration issues with attachments

Overall: The most authentic VR golf game I’ve played — even with its flaws, it’s the one I always come back to.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review, SlobbyGobster — we really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience!

Regarding green speed, you can simulate slower greens by reducing the maximum putt speed. To do this, go to Settings > Controllers / Attachment Configuration, and clicking SET CLUB SPEED, try setting the putter to 70%. From there, feel free to adjust until you find a value that feels comfortable and realistic for you.

About your comment on “Turf/ground contact not always accurate”, we’d love to understand more about what you’re experiencing. Could you clarify what you mean? If you'd like, feel free to reach out to us directly at users@aaagamestudios.com — we’re happy to investigate it further.

Also, we’re excited to share that in the next update, we’ll be adding presets for golf attachments, making setup even smoother.

And just so you know — we’ve forwarded your feedback to our development team. Your insights help us improve the game and shape future updates.

Thanks again for your support!

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this for a few years and the sand to left out right off fairways are much much easier to hit out of than the bunkers by the green. Most of the time it takes me 5 shots to get out of the green side bunkers which is ridiculous

developer_response.body:
Hi ajhudson15,

The physics of the bunkers has been worked on for a long time, and we were pleased to see that there was unanimity within the community in considering the result highly realistic. 

We’d recommend aiming the club a few centimeters behind the ball and opening the clubface as much as possible—turning it to the right if you’re right‑handed (to the left if you’re left‑handed)—so that the clubface is almost parallel to the ground. 

If you’re playing only with the controller, a quick wrist flick usually works well to get out of the bunkers.

Please let us know if this solves the problem. You can reach us at users@aaagamestudios.com or on the Golf 5 eClub Discord server, https://discord.gg/UXWTgEZShN.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Golf 5 is just pure chill. I jump in for a few holes whenever I need to disconnect, and it always does the trick. The swing feels realistic, the courses look great, and the online matches are full of friendly people. It’s the kind of game you start “just for a minute” and suddenly you’ve played way longer than planned. Super fun and super easy to enjoy.
A very polished game: fabulous graphics and realistic physics. I'm really enjoying it.

reviews.review_description: Fun game but stopped working for me I tried everything to help but it kept like blacking out and not letting me swing. Want refund

developer_response.body:
Hi Prattbrothers123,

We’re sorry to hear you’ve been experiencing these issues. Sometimes, local data can become corrupted, which may cause unexpected problems when launching the game. To resolve this, we recommend performing a clean reinstallation by following these steps:

- On your Meta Quest device, open Quick Settings, then select Settings in the top‑right corner of the Quick Settings window.
- In the left‑hand panel, go to General, then choose Storage on the right.
- Find Golf 5 in the list of installed apps.
- Select the Clear App Data icon next to the Golf 5 title to delete the game data.
- When the confirmation window appears, select Clear to proceed.
- Uninstall the app by selecting the trash bin icon.
- Reinstall the game from your Library.

Don’t worry—your handicap, achievements, and records will remain intact.

If the problem persists, feel free to contact us directly at users@aaagamestudios.com and we’ll be happy to assist you further.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: This is a fun single player game with good physics decent selection of beginning courses with tournaments and mini games. Unfortunately the multiplayer is completely unplayable. I have a 2 GB connection and it is absolutely impossible to get through a round with even one player, it's just completely choppy and lags like crazy every 2 to 3 seconds it freezes up.

developer_response.body:
Hi Beat_To_Death,

Thanks for your feedback — we're glad to hear you're enjoying the single player experience and the physics!

Regarding multiplayer: a smooth online match doesn’t depend solely on your own connection speed, but also on your opponent’s connection quality. Golf 5 doesn’t require high bandwidth to play, but we strongly recommend that all players choose a spot in their home with the best possible Wi-Fi coverage when joining online matches. This helps reduce lag and freezing for everyone involved.
Let us know if the issue persists — we’re always working to improve the experience.

Best, 
The Golf 5 Team

If I actually had a real club in my hand, I'd throw it through my d@mn window. The Gold club VR on steam works perfectly, and you can assist the length in game. Why is this not a feature?

developer_response.body:
Hi MooShooPork1,

To adjust the club's position to better match your height, follow these steps:
- Click the gear icon at the top right of the screen to open Settings.
- Select CONTROLLERS, then go to ATTACHMENT CONFIGURATION.
- Click on the "Position" box under CLUB POSITION & ROTATION.
- To move the club forward, push the thumb joystick forward.

This should help you align the club properly and make gameplay much more comfortable. Let us know if you need help with anything else. You can contact us directly at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards 
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Don't bet coins during tournament play, you will lose. Probably to get you to buy more coins. Multiplayer, hope you like idiots.

developer_response.body:
Hi Floppofan,

Thank you for sharing your opinion.

It’s important to clarify that Golf 5 does not involve betting. What we do offer are both free tournaments and paid tournaments. Paid tournaments allow you, with a small investment of G5, to compete for much bigger rewards.

Also, it is not necessary to pay to obtain G5. We offer up to 900 simply for registering your email, and you can earn additional G5 by completing achievements.

In Golf 5 VR we want every player to have the freedom to choose how they enjoy the game. If paid tournaments don’t appeal to you, you can simply choose not to participate in them and enjoy the free tournaments instead, rather than viewing the game in such a negative way.

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Just purchased today. Visually stunning  and excellent game physics. Set up to use with a yezro club attachment which was easy to do. Now my only issue is the length of the putter. I can't seem to adjust the length. It is way too short. Driver woods and irons are all perfect and easily adjustable. Or am I missing a trick with the putter ?

developer_response.body:
Hi MyaJax,

Thanks for your message, and we’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game so far.

Regarding the putter length with your Yezo attachment, try extending the putter slightly and see if you can find a position where all clubs feel comfortable. To do this, enter Practice with any club and select the putter. Then open Settings using the gear icon in the top‑right corner of the screen.

Go to Controls / Attachment Configuration, and tap the Position box under Club Position & Rotation. To move the club forward, push the thumb joystick forward. To save the new position, press the A button (or X on the left controller).

The goal is to match the putter’s position in VR with the real grip position of your attachment.

Let us know if you’d like help fine‑tuning the alignment. You can reach us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Hi, I'm Steve I want to play online.

developer_response.body:
Hi Steve,

Thanks for your comment.

Here are the steps to start an online game:
- In the main menu, click PLAY ONLINE, then choose your preferred Clubhouse.
- Once inside the Clubhouse, you can either join an existing game by selecting one from the list on the right, or create your own game by clicking the CREATE MATCH button.
- If you create your own game, you can configure its settings—game mode, course, etc. After selecting the parameters, wait for other players to join.
- Once at least one other player has joined, both of you need to press READY to start the match.

Hope this helps! If you have any further questions, please contact us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best regards
The Golf 5 Team

developer_response.body:
Hi VR_DannyBoy,

Thanks for the kind words! We're glad you're enjoying the game 

About your suggestion: you can enter Practice mode on any course, position yourself freely near the greens (or anywhere else), and hit as many balls as you like. It’s a great way to work on your chipping game exactly how you want. Give it a try and let us know how it goes! 

Best,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_title: Golf 5 is way better than Golf+
reviews.review_description: Not sure why so many are saying golf+ is better. It may be because I prefer playing alone and don’t really care about the multiplayer aspect since in golf 5 there aren’t as many people on it.  Everything else though is far better in golf 5. The graphics are much clearer and crisp while maintaining smooth framerate (golf+ was pretty choppy even at a lower resolution) The physics and camera views are better. The overall presentation seems more professional and makes golf+ feel like an arcade game. Another plus is that it’s cheaper and courses don’t cost as much. It would have been perfect if it had  pebble beach but it’s got st Andrew’s  which is just as good. Even the free courses are satisfactory enough.

developer_response.body:
Hi mistymithra, 

Thanks so much for the 5-star review!

Our team works hard to nail realistic physics and give you those smooth camera angles you need to line up every shot right. Keeping courses—and DLC—affordable is a big priority, so it’s great to hear you’re enjoying St Andrews (and our free offerings) without breaking the bank.

Pebble Beach is on our radar for a future update—stay tuned! We’ve got more authentic courses, gameplay tweaks and quality-of-life improvements in the pipeline, all built around that “pro” presentation you appreciate.

Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts. See you out on the fairway! 

Best regards
The Golf 5 Team

Hi nutcracker.189610,

Thanks for the thumbs up! We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game.

Best,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: When you first start you think wow this looks kinda good. After you start really playing... Janky controls, constantly resetting view, club will jump, knock and bounce around. The greens are terrible and inconsistent , can literally spend 20 minutes going from one side to the other as the putter a light tap now will go 3ft, the same tap next try will go 20ft. I was really excited to get involved in the tournament then ran 18 holes and might as well have let my cats play it was so janky and bad.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jerryx4, sorry you’ve run into so many frustrations. Let’s tackle each issue step by step.

First, the controller bouncing and knocking typically means the headset isn’t keeping solid line-of-sight to the controller. To improve tracking accuracy:

- Clothing: Avoid baggy sleeves or loose fabric that can block the headset’s cameras.
- Camera Maintenance: Wipe your headset’s cameras clean of dust or smudges before you play.
- Lighting Conditions: Play in a brightly and evenly lit room—no strong shadows or direct sunlight.
- Obstructions: Clear your play area of cables or other obstacles that might occlude the controller.
- Controller Placement: Keep the controller’s face (the part with LEDs or sensors) visible—don’t cover it fully with your hand.
If tracking still cuts out, feel free to reach out at users@aaagamestudios.com or hop into our Golf 5 eClub Discord (https://discord.gg/ZDHtETYA) so we can dig deeper.

As for the wildly inconsistent putting surfaces, you can simulate slower greens by lowering the putter max speed:

- From the main menu, tap the gear icon in the top-left corner to open Settings.
- Go to Controllers / Attachment Configuration.
- Select Set Club Speed—you’ll see a slider beneath the club-selection list.
- Start setting putter speed at around 80%, then test a few putts and tweak up or down until each light tap sends the ball the same distance.

Let us know how it goes! You can reach us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Best,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: This is a very good game it’s very detailed and it give very accurate shots and it’s just good in general

developer_response.body:
Hi frxsttyfn,

Wow—thank you so much for the 5 stars and the kind words! 🌟 We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying Golf 5. We’ve worked hard to make the game feel authentic, from the level of detail to the precision in the shots, so it means a lot that you noticed!

Your support keeps us swinging for greatness. ⛳ Keep having fun out there on the course!

Best regards,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: I bought both Golf 5 and Golf Plus before I had knee replacement surgery and in 3 months I have played Golf 5 approx. 1 hour total and Golf Plus a few hundred hours since then. Golf+ wins hands down over Golf 5. You could sit for a long time waiting for someone to play a round with on Golf 5 but on Golf+ there are always multiple people playing day or night. The mechanics of Golf+ are way better as far as hitting and tracking the ball, choosing and swinging the club and interacting with other players. The course conditions on Golf+ are easy to adjust and straight forward. I have become addicted to Golf+ over the course of 3 months of recovery from knee surgery and Golf 5 not so much. I regret purchasing Golf 5 and wouldn't recommend it over Golf+.  Golf + is better in too many ways to list here. Sorry Golf 5 you didn't make the cut.

developer_response.body:
***********************
UPDATE
We’d love to invite you to give Golf 5 another try — we’ve just released the free Playoff Edition update packed with improvements that we’re confident will change the way you feel about the game.

Here’s what’s new:
- Impressive new visuals in the Tropical and Forest courses
- A brand-new Clubhouse to explore
- Fresh club preset configurations for easier setup.
- Expanded options for left- and right-handed players
- Refined physics for a more realistic golfing experience
- A new Flash Mode: quick 3-hole rounds
- Exciting new online team play modes: Scramble and Fourball
We believe these updates make Golf 5 more enjoyable and immersive than ever before. Please give it another shot — we’re excited for you to see the difference! If you enjoy the improvements, we’d be grateful if you could update your rating to reflect your new experience.

Thank you for being part of our community.
***********************

Hi jimmylovesgolf,

First, we hope you're feeling better after your knee replacement surgery and that your recovery is going well.

We deeply appreciate your feedback on Golf 5. While we understand that Golf+ has been a wonderful experience for you, we're pleased to know that many players also find Golf 5 superior to competing products—especially due to its higher graphical quality and realistic ball physics. In fact, 88% of reviews for Golf 5 are positive, with ratings of 4 and 5 stars, which is a testament to how much players enjoy it.

Of course, personal preferences vary, but a one-star rating doesn’t fairly reflect the overall quality and experience that Golf 5 offers.  That said, we are always striving to improve and value the insights from our players. If you have any suggestions for making Golf 5 even better, feel free to share them with us at users@aaagamestudios.com.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your thoughts, and we hope to see you enjoying many more rounds!

Best,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: ...I consider both games incredible and love them both.  They each have a unique style of play that differs from each other and mechanics are a little different.  As are graphics and style.  I happily own and play both.  Kudos to developers!

developer_response.body:
Hi Vanderberge,

Thank you so much for your kind words and amazing support! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying Golf 5, and that each brings you a unique and fun experience. 

We pour a lot of heart into developing our games, so feedback like yours truly means a lot. Thanks for being part of the community—happy golfing! ⛳💚

Best,
The Golf 5 Team

reviews.review_description: Okay after playing this game for a few weeks heres the layout: 1 amazing graphics and quality i do believe the physics to be better then golf +… HOWEVER the people on this game will kill it before the developers do.. the people on golf 5 have been incredibly rude

developer_response.body:
Hi Pistolpete18,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. We're really glad to hear that you enjoy the amazing graphics and physics in Golf 5!

Regarding your concerns about player behavior, we understand that a positive gaming experience also depends on the community. However, we would like to point out that we are not responsible for individual player behavior, but we do actively monitor and enforce fair play. We take all reports seriously and address complaints at users@aaagamestudios.com, sanctioning any inappropriate conduct reported to us.

Given that your rating seems to reflect player interactions rather than the game itself, we hope you’ll consider adjusting your review to better reflect the quality of Golf 5. We’re always working to improve, and we truly appreciate your feedback.

Thank you again for playing Golf 5, and we hope you continue enjoying the experience!

Best,
The Golf 5 Team
